name: Claude
short_desc: AI assistant for writing, analysis and coding.
description_md: Claude is an AI assistant by Anthropic, strong at long-form writing, reasoning and document analysis.

name: Apify
short_desc: Web scraping and browser automation platform.
description_md: Apify lets you build, run and share web scrapers and automation actors at scale.

name: Airtable
short_desc: Airtable for real-time collaboration and workflow automation.
description_md: Airtable is a powerful no-code platform that unifies data, workflows, and teams. Build AI-powered apps and agents without coding knowledge. Streamline processes with sophisticated workflows in minutes.
seo_description: Build AI-powered apps & agents without coding. Unify workflows, teams, and data.

faq_jsonb.q: How does Airtable handle data security?
faq_jsonb.a: Data encryption and strict access controls are in place.

name: ElevenLabs
short_desc: AI voice generator for text-to-speech applications.
description_md:
ElevenLabs offers an AI voice generation platform with over 5,000 voices in 70+ languages. Ideal for creating lifelike speech in various applications like customer service, content creation, and audiobooks. Secure APIs and SDKs included.

Access a wide range of expressive voices tailored for different use cases such as narration, persuasion, and social media.
seo_description: Create lifelike speech with ElevenLabs' AI voice generator. Access 5,000+ voices for text-to-speech applications.

faq_jsonb.a: Yes, sign up for a free account to explore the platform.

faq_jsonb.q: Can I use ElevenLabs for commercial projects?
faq_jsonb.a: Yes, but check pricing and terms for details.

name: Notion
short_desc: Collaborative knowledge base and project management tool.
description_md: Notion is a versatile workspace that combines note-taking, task management, and database features. It supports custom agents for automation, integrates with various apps, and offers a unified platform for teams to collaborate efficiently.
seo_description: Build Custom Agents & Automate Tasks. Notion is the AI workspace that works for you.

faq_jsonb.q: Can I use Notion for personal projects?
faq_jsonb.a: Absolutely, it’s great for individuals and teams.
They automate tasks like Q&A, task routing, and reporting.

name: OpenAI
pricing_note: Some services are free, others require payment.
short_desc: OpenAI's research and deployment platform for AI models.
description_md: OpenAI is a research institute focused on advancing artificial intelligence in ways that are safe and beneficial. Their tools include the Codex, ChatGPT, and various APIs designed to integrate advanced AI capabilities into applications and workflows.
seo_description: Advance your projects with OpenAI's cutting-edge AI tools and APIs. Focus on safety, ethics, and innovation.

faq_jsonb.a: Some services are freemium, others require payment.

faq_jsonb.q: Can I use OpenAI for commercial projects?
faq_jsonb.a: Commercial use is subject to licensing agreements.

faq_jsonb.q: How often do you update the models?
faq_jsonb.a: Models are updated regularly based on research advancements.

name: Perplexity
short_desc: AI-powered answer engine for accurate and real-time information.
description_md:
Perplexity is an AI tool that provides quick, reliable answers to any question. It uses advanced natural language processing to ensure accuracy and relevance in its responses.

Ideal for researchers, students, or anyone needing instant access to factual information.
seo_description: Get accurate, real-time answers with Perplexity's AI-powered tool.
cons_jsonb: Limited depth of knowledge on niche topics

faq_jsonb.a: Answers are highly accurate due to advanced NLP.

faq_jsonb.q: Does it require an internet connection?
faq_jsonb.a: Internet is needed for real-time updates.

name: Pipedream
pricing_note: Free plan available, paid for advanced features.
short_desc: Automate workflows by connecting APIs and services.
description_md: Pipedream is a no-code/low-code platform that enables users to build automated workflows by connecting various APIs, databases, and services. It supports both code-based and visual flow creation for integrating different applications and automating tasks with AI agents.
seo_description: Build powerful apps by connecting APIs & services with Pipedream.

faq_jsonb.q: Can I use it without coding?

faq_jsonb.a: Sign up and explore pre-built templates.
